question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/NetworkNodeRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: findNetworkNodes()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `maxStake` field (from `nullif(ns.max_stake, -1)`) to identify nodes where `max_stake` is set to an unusually high value, indicating that those nodes can accumulate disproportionate consensus weight and thus collect fees at a rate outside normal design parameters?
